title: Toggle Elytra
description: A Fabric mod that adds a key to toggle Elytra flight.
body: # Toggle Elytra A Fabric mod that adds a key to toggle Elytra flight. # How to use it Press the toggle keybind (defaulted to: H) and it will switch your Elytra on and off. # Other Information It should also work for every mod that uses the Fabric Elytra API, including Winged For bug reporting please proceed to the mod's GitHub repository: https://github.com/CaelTheColher/ToggleElytra #
